name: detect_language
description: Detect the language of one or more text strings. Returns the ISO 639-1 language code and a confidence score for each input text. Useful for routing text to the correct translation pipeline or validating user input language.

parameters.name: texts
parameters.description: Array of text strings whose language should be detected. Longer texts produce more accurate results.

texts: Guten Tag, wie geht es Ihnen?

detections.text: Guten Tag, wie geht es Ihnen?
